## 개념 규정

## 지도학적 일반화

<https://sangillee.snu.ac.kr/book_gis/vector_generalization.html>

## 기호화

### 시각 변수

#### 준비 작업

-   필수적인 패키지 불러오기


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(tmaptools)
library(rayshader)
```
:::


-   지리공간데이터 불러오기


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
seoul_EMD <- read_sf(
  "D:/My R/Korean Administrative Areas/행정구역 셰이프 파일/2 Original Cleaning/2021_4Q/SEOUL_EMD_2021_4Q.shp", options = "ENCODING=CP949")
seoul_EMD_2020 <- read_sf(
  "D:/My R/Korean Administrative Areas/행정구역 셰이프 파일/2 Original Cleaning/2020_2Q/SEOUL_EMD_2020_2Q.shp", options = "ENCODING=CP949")
seoul_gu <- read_sf(
  "D:/My R/Korean Administrative Areas/행정구역 셰이프 파일/2 Original Cleaning/2021_4Q/SEOUL_GU_2021_4Q.shp", options = "ENCODING=CP949")
seoul_sido <- read_sf(
  "D:/My R/Korean Administrative Areas/행정구역 셰이프 파일/2 Original Cleaning/2021_4Q/SEOUL_SIDO_2021_4Q.shp", options = "ENCODING=CP949")
```
:::


-   지도 확인


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
qtm(seoul_EMD)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](04_cartographic_communication_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=4200}
:::
:::


-   1인가구 속성 데이터 불러오기


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
house_SDGGEMD_2020 <- read_excel(
  "D:/My R/Population Geography/3 Population Structure/Housing_Size_2020_Adj.xlsx", sheet = 1
  )
```
:::


-   결합하기


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
seoul_EMD_2020 <- seoul_EMD_2020 |> 
  mutate(
    EMD_ID = as.numeric(EMD_ID)
  )
my_df <-seoul_EMD_2020 |> 
  left_join(
    house_SDGGEMD_2020, join_by(EMD_ID == Code)
  )
```
:::


#### 조감고도 perspective heights

-   ggplot2를 이용하여 지도 제작


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
my_map <- my_df |> 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    aes(fill = House1_p), 
    color = NA, show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
  labs(fill = "% of Single \n Households") + 
  scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )
my_map
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](04_cartographic_communication_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=4200}
:::
:::


-   3D


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
plot_gg(my_map, 
        width = 5, height = 4, scale = 300, 
        multicore = TRUE, windowsize = c(1726, 1174), 
        zoom = 0.35, phi = 55, theta = 20, sunangle = 225, fov = 70)
Sys.sleep(0.2)
```
:::


-   포착


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
render_snapshot(clear = TRUE, file = "D:/My Cartography/지도제작/4-1 조감고도.png")
```
:::


#### 색상 hue

-   지도 제작


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
my_map <- my_df |> 
  tm_shape() + 
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "SGG1_NM", col = "gray20", lwd = 0.75, 
    fill.scale = tm_scale_categorical(
      # values = palette.colors(24, "Polychrome 36")
      values = "alphabet2"
    ),
    fill.legend = tm_legend_hide()
  ) + 
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 0.05))

my_map
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](04_cartographic_communication_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=9463.26}
:::
:::


-   저장


::: {.cell}

:::


#### 명도 value

-   지도 제작


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# 완전히 명도만의 컬러스킴 생성
library(colorspace)
cols <- sequential_hcl(
  n = 7,
  h = 250,           # 청색 계열 (240~260 사이에서 조정)
  c = c(8, 55),      # 양끝은 채도를 낮게(특히 밝은쪽/어두운쪽), 가운데만 채도 확보
  l = c(96, 28),     # 너무 어둡게(예: 15 이하) 가면 회색/보라로 꺾이기 쉬움
  power = 1.1
) 

my_map <- my_df |> 
  tm_shape() + 
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "House1_p", col = "gray20", lwd = 0.75, 
    fill.scale = tm_scale_intervals(
      breaks = c(-Inf, 15, 25, 35, 45, 55, 65, Inf),
      values = cols
    ), 
    fill.legend = tm_legend_hide()
  ) +
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 0.05))

my_map
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](04_cartographic_communication_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-11-1.png){width=9463.26}
:::
:::


-   저장


::: {.cell}

:::


-   지도 제작


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
my_map <- my_df |> 
  tm_shape() + 
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "House1_p", col = "gray20", lwd = 0.75, 
    fill.scale = tm_scale_intervals(
      breaks = c(-Inf, 15, 25, 35, 45, 55, 65, Inf),
      values = "brewer.blues"
    ), 
    fill.legend = tm_legend_hide()
  ) +
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 0.05))

my_map
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](04_cartographic_communication_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-1.png){width=9463.26}
:::
:::


-   저장


::: {.cell}

:::


#### 채도 saturation

-   지도 제작


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
saturation_7 <- c("#18C800", "#24BB0E", "#2FA81F", "#3A9531", 
  "#46833F", "#516F4C", "#5C5C5C")

my_map <- my_df |> 
  tm_shape() + 
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "House1_p", col = "gray20", lwd = 0.75, 
    fill.scale = tm_scale_intervals(
      breaks = c(-Inf, 15, 25, 35, 45, 55, 65, Inf),
      values = saturation_7
    ), 
    fill.legend = tm_legend_hide()
  ) +
  tm_layout(inner.margins = c(0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 0.05))

my_map
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](04_cartographic_communication_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-15-1.png){width=9463.26}
:::
:::


-   저장


::: {.cell}

:::


#### 질감 texture


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggpattern)
library(gridpattern)
library(magick)

# 1) 구 이름을 map_id처럼 사용할 범주 변수로 확보
seoul_gu2 <- seoul_gu |>
  mutate(gu = as.character(SGG1_FNM))

# 2) gu 레벨 수만큼 magick 패턴을 뽑아(무작위) 매핑 벡터를 만든다
set.seed(20260227)
lev <- sort(unique(seoul_gu2$gu))

# gridpattern::names_magick 에서 구 개수만큼 "중복 없이" 뽑기
# (names_magick 길이가 구 개수보다 짧으면 replace=TRUE로 바꾸면 됩니다)
picked <- sample(gridpattern::names_magick, size = length(lev), replace = FALSE)

# named vector: (이름=gu) -> (값=pattern name)
pat_map <- setNames(picked, lev)

# 3) sf + geom_sf_pattern
my_graph <- ggplot(seoul_gu2) +
  geom_sf_pattern(
    aes(pattern_type = gu),
    pattern              = "magick",
    pattern_fill         = "black",
    pattern_aspect_ratio = 1.75,
    fill                 = "white",
    colour               = "black"
  ) +
  coord_sf() +
  theme_bw() +
  # 핵심: choices에 “구이름 -> magick패턴” 매핑을 넣는다
  scale_pattern_type_discrete(choices = pat_map) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
my_graph
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](04_cartographic_communication_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-17-1.png){width=4200}
:::
:::
